product_overview: A web-based admin console for logging into the system and accessing operational pages for ML training, model monitoring, calibration, algorithm settings, Elo ratings, and signal backtesting. It provides authenticated navigation across multiple internal dashboards for reviewing performance and triggering training workflows.
core_goals: Log into the admin console with valid credentials
Review ML training status and trigger a training run
Inspect historical signal backtest results and apply date or horizon filters
Access operational admin pages for algorithm, calibration, Elo, and ML monitoring views

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Allows an admin user to access the protected admin area using a username and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Enter username and password -> Submit the login form -> Receive access to the admin area
Navigate to /admin -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See a login failure message

features.name: Admin Dashboard Navigation
features.description: Provides authenticated navigation across the admin pages from the main dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Sign in successfully -> Open the admin dashboard -> Select a sub-page -> See the chosen admin section
Navigate to /admin -> Sign in successfully -> Open the admin dashboard -> Select ML training -> See the ML training page
Navigate to /admin -> Sign in successfully -> Open the admin dashboard -> Select Signals backtest -> See the signals backtest page

features.name: ML Training Pipeline
features.description: Lets an admin view current training status and trigger a machine learning training run.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/ml/train -> View the current training status -> Trigger a training run -> See the training workflow start
Navigate to /admin/ml/train -> View the current training status -> Trigger a training run -> See the updated status after the request is submitted

features.name: Signals Backtest
features.description: Lets an admin review historical signal performance and narrow results by date or horizon.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/signals/backtest -> View the backtest tables -> Filter results by date or horizon -> See the refreshed historical performance data
Navigate to /admin/signals/backtest -> View the backtest tables -> Change the filter criteria -> See the backtest results update

routes.description: Admin dashboard root with nav cards

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: PBKDF2-hashed admin auth with session tokens
user_interactions: Receive session token (cookie admin_token or Bearer header)

features.name: ML Training Pipeline
features.description: Schedule + trigger ML training jobs with horizon export

known_limitations.issue: ML in-play retrain skipped at boot (ML_TRAINER_URL not set)
known_limitations.impact: In-play ML scheduler disabled; only 5/10/15-min horizon exports run

known_limitations.issue: TestSprite MCP bootstrap times out on this project
known_limitations.impact: Plan generation forced via manual YAML + CLI fallback

known_limitations.issue: Admin user requires password change on first login (mustChange=true)
known_limitations.impact: Login flow must handle post-login redirect to change-password
